title: Wynncraft: Legacy Spell Cast Indicators
description: A Wynncraft resource pack that restores the original spell-casting visuals, bringing back the nostalgic look.
body:
<center>This resource pack replaces the current spell-casting icons with the classic 'L' and 'R' letter from the pre-2.1 versions of Wynncraft.

![Showcase of casting a spell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c926aaa84fb6c16b657475fdd0136f3db32f3c59.png)
</center>
